title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind
summary: Gemini 3 Flash Preview provides audio understanding via a single API call with speaker labels, timestamps, emotion tags, language detection, translation, and summarization. The system also enables speech generation directed by text prompts and real-time multimodal audio processing through Gemini 3.1 Flash Live with integrated reasoning.
writeup: Thor Schaeff of Google DeepMind walks through Gemini's audio stack, from transcription to live music. Gemini 3 Flash Preview handles audio understanding in a single API call, returning speaker labels, timestamps, emotion tags, language detection, translation, and summarization. The talk also covers speech generation directed by text prompts and real-time multimodal audio processing via Gemini 3.1 Flash Live with integrated reasoning. The takeaway: speaker diarization, emotion detection, and live multimodal handling consolidate into one model interface rather than a chain of separate services.
